1.title: Invocations Sum (by Region)
1.query:
timeseries invocations_sum_by_region = avg(cloud.aws.events.invocations_sum_by_region),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device_group }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_group_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device_group)
| sort arrayAvg(invocations_sum_by_region) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Invocations Sum (by Region and RuleName)
2.query:
timeseries invocations_sum_by_region_rule_name = avg(cloud.aws.events.invocations_sum_by_region_rule_name),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device_group }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_group_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device_group)
| sort arrayAvg(invocations_sum_by_region_rule_name) desc
| limit 20
